modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty installing the latest version of Bluebeam Revu.

full_description_text: 
El usuario está tratando de instalar la última versión de Bluebeam Revu en su computadora con Windows a través del Company Portal. Sin embargo, no está claro cómo proceder con la instalación. Se necesita asistencia para completar este proceso de instalación correctamente.
